urdu transliteration text: Zahra tujhe darbbaar mein haq kyun naa mila hain?
english translation text: O bibi Zahra (as), why they did not give your right in the darbaar?

urdu transliteration text: Shaayad ke yahi ajre risaalat ka sila hain
english translation text: Perhaps this might be the payback to Rasool by the umma !!

urdu transliteration text: Mehroom rahi haq say tu ummat ki sadaayi Jhutlaai sharifoon nai teri paak gawahi
english translation text: O bibi Zahra (as), your right was not given to you. Even your provided witnesses were ignored by khalifah

urdu transliteration text: Iss gham nai tere dil ka sukoon chinlia hai
english translation text: That was the reason you were in extreme mourning

urdu transliteration text: Ehsaan faraamoshon nai hai tujh ko rulaaya or baade nabi kyun hai saqife mein bulaaya
english translation text: Followers of wrongful left you cry and cry. Those followers, then organized Saqeefa

urdu transliteration text: 1400 baras se hame yehi to gilaa hain
english translation text: This is the complain we are having for last 1400 years

urdu transliteration text:
Darwaaza tere pehlu pe zaalim ne giraaya
Those wrong doers threw burning door on your body
Kyun binte Muhammad pe use rehem na aaya kis jurm mein zaalim ne tujhe zakhm diya hai
english translation text: They did not bother observe your highness. Why they did cruelty on You?

urdu transliteration text: Maatam teri aulaad ka din raat karenge parte hain agar kalma to haq baat karenge
english translation text: We will keep mourning on you and your family. We must keep mourning like we say Kalima

urdu transliteration text: Jannat teri aulaad ko rone ka sila hai
english translation text: Heavens is just a minor reward to cry on your family

urdu transliteration text:
Farmaane risaalat ko jo bhulay vo zaalim
All who ignored the Prophet’s advice about Ghadeer
Beshak wo namaazi hain ya deen ke aalim unke liye sardaar Jahannam ki saza hai
english translation text: Among them might be namaazee or scholars but they will get highest and painful punishment on the day of judgement
